title: thalictrum × timeroyi nothosubsp. timeroyi
intro: Thalictrum × timeroyi nothosubsp. timeroyi, also known as meadow rue, is a hybrid plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of meadow rue are used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
